response.overview: ProBox TV returns to San Bernardino, California for another action-packed night of boxing at the National Orange Show Events Center. Headlined by Bryan “Nino Maravilla” Flores vs. Jonathan “Thunder” Navarro in a 10-round super lightweight main event, with a strong lineup that also includes Joshua Anton vs. Vladimir Hernandez, Ruben Aguilar vs. Tre’Sean Wiggins, and a women’s title fight between Adelaida Ruiz and Ginny Fuchs.
response.title: Bryan Flores vs. Jonathan Navarro
